options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: starting_song_count
options.description: The number of songs that will be unlocked from the start

options.name: additional_song_count
options.description:
The total number of songs that will be placed in the randomization pool.
- This does not count any starting songs or the goal song.
- The final song count may be lower due to other settings.

options.name: duplicate_song_percentage
options.description:
Percentage of duplicate songs to place in remaining filler slots.
Duplicate songs are considered Useful and thus out of logic.

options.name: diamond_count_percentage
options.description: Percentage of filler item to be replaced with diamonds.

options.name: diamond_win_percentage
options.description: The percentage of diamonds in the item pool that are needed to unlock the winning song.

options.name: dlc_songs
options.description:
Choose which DLC Packs will be included in the pool of chooseable songs.
Both individual songs and dlc pack names work.

Current DLC Pack Groups: ["All", "Celeste", "Pizza Tower", "Hatsune Miku", "Hololive", "Everhood", "Monstercat", "Shovel Knight", 
                          "Friday Night Funkin'", "VA-11 HALL-A", "Undertale", "Volume 2"]
options: A Banj After Midnight (feat. M Gewehr)
High Above the Land (The Flying Machine)
In the Halls of the Usurper (Pridemoor Keep)

options.name: include_remix
options.description: Adds remix mode songs as separate items and locations. When off, both normal and remix mode unlocks are the same.

options.name: include_minigames
options.description:
Adds minigames to the song pool.
Split allows medium and hard variants to be shuffled separately.

options.name: include_boss_battle
options.description:
Add boss battles to the song pool
Split allows medium and hard variants to be shuffled separately.

options.name: include_songs_percentage
options.description: Percentage chance for songs in the included list to be chosen.

options.name: include_songs
options.description:
These songs will be guaranteed* to show up within the seed.
- You must have the DLC or respective game mode enabled for these songs to actually be picked.
- Difficulty options will affect these songs.
- *Changing Include Songs Percentage from 100% will make it no longer guarenteed.
options: In the Halls of the Usurper (Pridemoor Keep)
In the Halls of the Usurper (Pridemoor Keep) (Remix)
High Above the Land (The Flying Machine)
High Above the Land (The Flying Machine) (Remix)
A Banj After Midnight (feat. M Gewehr)
A Banj After Midnight (feat. M Gewehr) (Remix)

options.name: exclude_songs
options.description:
These songs will be guaranteed to not show up within the seed.

Note: Does not affect songs within the "Include Songs" list.
options: In the Halls of the Usurper (Pridemoor Keep)
In the Halls of the Usurper (Pridemoor Keep) (Remix)
High Above the Land (The Flying Machine)
High Above the Land (The Flying Machine) (Remix)
A Banj After Midnight (feat. M Gewehr)
A Banj After Midnight (feat. M Gewehr) (Remix)

options.name: goal_song_pool
options.description:
Songs listed here will randomly chosen to be the final song.
If empty, the goal song will be chosen randomly from all included songs.
options: In the Halls of the Usurper (Pridemoor Keep)

options.name: rotn_mod_data
options.description:
Experimental: Custom songs to add to the pool.  If you want to use this, ppen the custom songs menu
with the mod active and paste the contents of the /Output/CustomSongs.json file here.

Note: Any songs with intensity ratings outside of the range -1 - 40 will be automatically changed to fit this range
If this is an issue, exclude them instead

options.name: difficulty_option
options.description:
Determines what difficulties to be selected for song filtering (Rhythm Rifts only)
This setting will not force you to play on any of the selected difficulties and intened to be used with the following intensity settings

options.name: min_intensity
options.description:
Ensures chosen rhythm rift will have a chart with an intensity value higher than this value (Rhythm Rifts only)
Note: Highest intensity song in vanilla is 30

options.name: max_intensity
options.description:
Ensures chosen rhythm rift will have a chart with an intensity value lower than this value (Rhythm Rifts only)
Note: Highest intensity song in vanilla is 30

options.name: grade_needed
options.description: Minimum Grade required on song completion to send a check

options.name: full_combo_needed
options.description: Requires a full combo on song completion to send a check

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
